title: Dekton 7.5" Mains Tester for AC Voltage Measurement from 100V to 500V with Long-Life Neon Bulb, Essential Tool for Electrical Diagnostics and Safety Checks in Home, Workshop, and Industry Applications
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

Versatile Voltage Measurement: The Dekton 7.5" Mains Tester accurately measures AC voltage levels ranging from 100V to 500V, making it ideal for a variety of electrical applications, whether at home or in industrial settings.
Long-Life Neon Bulb: Equipped with a durable neon bulb, this tester ensures reliable performance and longevity, providing a clear indication of voltage presence without frequent replacements.
User-Friendly Design: The compact size fits comfortably in your hand, allowing for easy maneuverability when checking outlets, wiring, and other electrical components, even in tight spaces.
Safety First: This mains tester is designed to enhance safety during electrical work, enabling users to quickly determine voltage levels and prevent electrical hazards.

Essential for Professionals and DIYers: Whether you're an electrician, technician, or DIY enthusiast, the Dekton Mains Tester is an essential tool for effective electrical diagnostics, ensuring peace of mind during your projects.
description: The Dekton 7.5" Mains Tester is an essential tool for anyone working with electrical systems, measuring AC voltage from 100V to 500V with precision. This compact tester features a long-life neon bulb that provides a bright, clear indication of voltage presence, ensuring reliability during use. Its ergonomic design fits comfortably in your hand, allowing for easy access to tight spaces when checking outlets, wiring, and appliances. The tester is built for safety, helping to prevent electrical hazards by quickly identifying voltage levels. Whether you're a professional electrician, a technician, or a DIY enthusiast, this mains tester is perfect for your toolkit. With its durable construction and user-friendly design, the Dekton 7.5" Mains Tester is ideal for various applications, from home improvement projects to industrial settings. Keep your electrical work safe and efficient with this vital instrument that combines functionality, durability, and ease of use, making it a must-have for any electrical work.
